title: 新增测验历史回看后端接口 GET /learning-coach/quiz/history/{quiz_id}
description: 当前前端 history-record-card-quiz.tsx:46 的『回看』按钮会 navigate 到 /quiz/:sessionId 重新触发 quiz/generate，无法真正回看历史答卷。需要后端提供只读查询接口，按 quiz_id 从 RuoYi 的 xm_quiz_result 表拉取答题记录（含题目、用户选项、正确答案、解析、得分）。只读，不触发任何生成。
action: 在 packages/fastapi-backend/app/features/learning_coach/service.py 新增 async fetch_quiz_history(quiz_id, user_id, access_context) -> QuizHistoryPayload；通过 LearningService 或新增方法调 RuoYi GET /internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quiz_id}（RuoYi 侧需实现该接口 — 本 task 仅建 FastAPI 端占位 + 接入，RuoYi 端接口实现放到 TASK-005 扩展说明，若 RuoYi 接口未就绪则 FastAPI 层先 raise 503 不崩）。路由 GET /learning-coach/quiz/history/{quiz_id}。schema 定义 QuizHistoryPayload { quiz_id, source, question_total, correct_total, score, summary, items: [{question_id, stem, options, selected_option_id, correct_option_id, is_correct, explanation}], occurred_at }。

criteria: cd packages/fastapi-backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/learning_coach -x exits 0
convergence.verification: pytest 绿；mock RuoYi 返回测试数据验证 payload 结构；RuoYi 不可达时返回 503 且不传播异常
convergence.definition_of_done: 前端可通过该端点拿到只读历史答卷，不触发任何生成

files.change: pydantic 模型，字段如 description 所列；Envelope 包裹 data
调 self._persistence_service.fetch_quiz_history（新增）读 RuoYi，组装返回
调 RuoYiClient.get(/internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quiz_id}) 读历史；RuoYi 接口未就绪时 raise IntegrationError(status=503)
路由函数 fetch_quiz_history_route，鉴权 get_access_context，调 service.fetch_quiz_history

implementation: schemas.py：新增 QuizHistoryItem(question_id, stem, options, selected_option_id, correct_option_id, is_correct, explanation)
schemas.py：新增 QuizHistoryPayload(quiz_id, source, question_total, correct_total, score, summary, items, occurred_at) + QuizHistoryEnvelope

learning/service.py：新增 async fetch_quiz_history(quiz_id, user_id, access_context) -> dict；用 RuoYiClient async with 调 GET /internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quiz_id}；捕获 404 返回 None；捕获其他异常 raise IntegrationError(status_code=503)

learning_coach/service.py：新增 async fetch_quiz_history(quiz_id, user_id, access_context) -> QuizHistoryPayload；调 persistence_service.fetch_quiz_history；转换 RuoYi 字段为 QuizHistoryPayload；若 None raise AppError(code='QUIZ_HISTORY_NOT_FOUND', status=404)

routes.py：@router.get('/quiz/history/{quiz_id}', response_model=QuizHistoryEnvelope) async def fetch_quiz_history_route(quiz_id: str, access_context = Depends(get_access_context), service = Depends(get_learning_coach_service))
编写 unit test：mock persistence 返回 dict → 断言 QuizHistoryPayload 字段正确；mock 返回 None → 断言 404；mock RuoYi 503 → 断言 503 传播
给 LearningService 也加 unit test：mock RuoYiClient 的各种响应

commands: cd packages/fastapi-backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/learning_coach tests/unit/learning -x

reference.pattern: LearningService.persist_results 与 learning_coach/routes.py 其他 POST 路由的结构

rationale.chosen_approach: FastAPI 先落地接口与 schema；RuoYi 侧接口若未就绪可以先 mock 响应，后续让 Java 同学补实现（通过 issue 跟踪）
decision_factors: 前端可基于 schema 先做页面

risks.mitigation: 本 task 落地 FastAPI 调用层；RuoYi 侧用 issue 单独追踪；前端 TASK-006 调这个接口时若 503 展示『历史数据暂不可用』
